sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: CORNING INC /NY의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 핵심 매출이 40억 4,500만 달러로 전년 대비 14% 성장했고 핵심 주당순이익은 0.67달러로 24% 늘었습니다.
광통신 부문 매출이 16억 5,200만 달러로 전년 대비 33% 급증하며 젠AI 수요가 성장을 견인했습니다.
GAAP 영업이익률은 14.4%, 핵심 영업이익률은 19.6%였고 조정 잉여현금흐름은 5억 3,500만 달러를 기록했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 광통신을 중심으로 젠AI 제품 수요가 강하게 나타났고, 회사는 4분기 핵심 매출을 약 43억 5,000만 달러로 전망했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: GAAP 영업현금흐름은 7억 8,400만 달러, 조정 잉여현금흐름은 5억 3,500만 달러였습니다.

watchItems.text: 회사가 제시한 스프링보드 20% 영업이익률 목표를 4분기에 1년 앞당겨 달성하는지가 관전 포인트입니다.
젠AI·태양광 웨이퍼 수요가 4분기에도 지속되는지 주목할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Corning Reports Third-Quarter 2025 Financial Results Page 2 Schlesinger continued, “We expect continued strong growth in the fourth quarter, driven by ongoing robust demand for our Gen AI products and sales of solar wafers. We're guiding to core sales of approximately $4.35 billion, with core EPS growing faster than sales to a range of $0.68 to $0.72. Additionally, we are on track to achieve our Springboard operating margin target of 20% in the fourth quarter, a year ahead of plan. This represents a 370-basis-point improvement from our Q4-2023 starting point – and establishes a strong return profile as we continue to grow sales.” Third-Quarter 2025 Financial Highlights: • GAAP sales were $4.10 billion. Core sales were $4.27 billion. • GAAP EPS was $0.50. Core EPS  Normalized numeric aliases: $4.35 billion = 43억 5,000만 달러; $4.10 billion = 41억 달러; $4.27 billion = 42억 7,000만 달러; $4.35 = 4.35달러; $0.68 = 0.68달러; $0.72 = 0.72달러; $4.10 = 4.10달러; $4.27 = 4.27달러; $0.67 = 0.67달러; $0.50 = 0.50달러.

anslated earnings contracts and foreign-denominated debt as well as constant currency adjustments. • GAAP operating margin was 14.4%. Core operating margin was 19.6%. • GAAP operating cash flow was $784 million, and adjusted free cash flow was $535 million. Fourth-Quarter 2025 Outlook: • In the fourth quarter, the company expects continued growth, with core sales of approximately $4.35 billion and core EPS again growing faster than sales to a range of $0.68 to $0.72.
